title: Hardened evader (synthetic — proves defense-in-depth against known evasions)
summary: Synthetic fixture that combines four documented evasion classes: process/env aliasing, computed-string require, charCode/hex/atob URL encoding, and payload distribution across multiple files. Locks in that hardening improvements do not regress. Ships as CLEAN in v0.1.0; expected BLOCK in v0.2.0.
